mnemonics: HARMONY: Human-Centred AI Resources Make Optimal New Yields (reminds you these resources are for building AI that works in harmony with humans)
keyPoints: Focus on resources that emphasize ethics, fairness, and transparency in AI systems.
Prioritize materials that cover practical methods for human-AI collaboration and interaction design.
Seek out foundational texts and recent research on value alignment and mitigating AI bias.
commonMistakes: Assuming technical performance metrics are the sole measure of a good AI system, neglecting human factors.
Overlooking resources about the societal and long-term impacts of AI deployment.
Focusing only on the 'how' of building AI and skipping the 'why' and 'for whom'.
